title: Hornet Removal in East Harlem, Manhattan | $350 - $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in East Harlem, Manhattan. Safe, fast hornet nest elimination from $350-$550. Licensed experts serving El Barrio. Call today!
intro: East Harlem residents facing hornet infestations need fast, professional removal to protect their families and neighbors. Our specialized hornet removal services safely eliminate nests from brownstones, walk-ups, and community gardens throughout El Barrio. Best Pest Control NYC provides same-day hornet removal services to keep East Harlem homes and businesses safe.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served East Harlem for years with licensed technicians who understand the unique challenges of this vibrant Manhattan neighborhood. We offer transparent pricing, safe removal methods that protect children and pets, and guaranteed results with follow-up inspections included in every service.
localContext: East Harlem's mix of pre-war buildings, public housing complexes, and tree-lined streets around Marcus Garvey Park creates ideal conditions for hornet nests in eaves, fire escapes, and courtyards. From Pleasant Avenue to the brownstones near Museum Mile, our team knows the architectural features that attract hornets and can access even hard-to-reach nests on upper floors.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout East Harlem. Once you call, we typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Our technicians come fully equipped to safely remove nests from any location, whether on a fire escape, under an eave, or in a community garden.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, and safe disposal of the nest. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and building height. We also include a follow-up visit within two weeks to ensure no hornets have returned.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for East Harlem apartments and families?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for use around children, pets, and food preparation areas. Our technicians are trained in low-impact removal methods perfect for East Harlem's dense residential buildings. We take extra precautions in multi-family buildings to protect all residents during the removal process.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity peaks in East Harlem from late spring through early fall (May through October), with August and September being the most active months. Nests grow largest during summer, so early detection and removal are crucial. If you spot hornet activity, contact us immediately rather than waiting, as colonies can grow rapidly in warm weather.
